workOrder.title: Add in-page focus filters to Mentor Dashboard assigned students

selectionReason: The mentor dashboard already receives scoped assigned-student rows with revision, meeting, presentation, outline, evidence, and needsAttention signals, but mentors had to scan the full list to focus on a follow-up type.
userFacingImprovement: Mentors can filter assigned students by revision follow-up, meeting attention, or presentation follow-up without leaving the dashboard.
privacyAndPermissionNotes: No API route, query parameter, role, permission, mutation, tenant boundary, site boundary, program scope, mentor assignment scope, or student visibility changed.
The filters run only over rows already returned by the scoped /api/mentor/dashboard response.
Student detail and meeting-history actions continue to use the existing authorized detail route and mentor dashboard source context.

candidateSummary.decision: deferred; hosted audit writes not allowed
rejected; current code/tests already support it

validation.notes: Full validation passed; git diff --check reported only CRLF normalization warnings.

doNotRepeat: Do not re-add Mentor Dashboard focus filters unless data-mentor-dashboard-filters="true" or focused workspace coverage regresses.

ladderHandoff.evidence: Mentor Dashboard now narrows already scoped assigned-student rows by revision, meeting, and presentation follow-up.
ladderHandoff.unlocks: Mentors can focus check-ins and presentation support before opening student detail or meeting history.
ladderHandoff.next: Run hosted section-level permission proof when allowed; otherwise clean stale missing-evidence deferred state or choose a route-backed queue slice only when backend semantics exist.
ladderHandoff.blockers: Hosted proof needs safe fake-account/audit runtime; missing-submission queue rows do not exist; archive retry/regenerate needs mutation policy.
